trajectory.description: Observation: Baseline macro_f1=0.3843 with 3 epochs single GPU. Analysis: Need multi-GPU, more epochs, focal loss for long-tail, better augmentation. Decision: Rewrite train.py with DataParallel, focal loss, 10 epochs. ~40 min estimated with 4 GPUs.

trajectory.error_summary: [TIMEOUT] Command exceeded 3730s limit. Consider reducing epochs or using a smaller model.
trajectory.description: Observation: Iter 10 training destroyed the model (F1=0.005 vs 0.3843 baseline). The good checkpoint was overwritten. With ~1 hour left, I need to quickly retrain 2-3 epochs with the simple approach (CE loss, no class-balanced sampling) that worked before. Each epoch on single GPU was ~16 min, so 3 epochs = 48 min. With DataParallel properly working, maybe faster. Decision: Quick retrain with simple CE loss, submit eval.
